<s>val</s> ¦ (<ab>cf.</ab> √ <s>bal</s>, <s>vall</s>, and <s>vf</s>) <ab>cl.</ab> 1. <ab>Ā.</ab> (<ls>Dhātup. xiv, 20</ls>) <s>valate</s> (oftener <ab>P.</ab> <s>valati</s>; <ab>cf.</ab> <ls>Vām. v, 2, 3</ls>; <ab>pf.</ab> <s>vavale</s>; <ab>ind.p.</ab> <s>valitvA</s>, <ls>Kāv.</ls>; <ab>aor.</ab> <s>avalizwa</s>; <ab>fut.</ab> <s>valitA</s> &c. <ab>Gr.</ab>),
<div n="to"/>to turn, turn round, turn to (with <s>aBimuKam</s> and <ab>acc.</ab>, or <ab>loc.</ab>), <ls>Kāv.</ls>; <ls>Kathās.</ls> &c.;
<div n="to"/>to be drawn or attached towards, be attached to (<ab>loc.</ab>), <ls>Nalod.</ls>; <ls>Gīt.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to move to and fro, <ls>Hcat.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to go, approach, hasten, <ls>Mcar.</ls>; <ls>Śiś.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to return <ab>i.e.</ab> come back or home, <ls>Uttamac.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to return <ab>i.e.</ab> depart or go away again, <ls>ib.</ls>; <ls>HPariś.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to break forth, appear, <ls>Gīt.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to increase, <ls>Sāh.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to cover or enclose or to be covered (<ab>cf.</ab> √ <hom>1.</hom> <s>vf</s>), <ls>L.</ls> :
<div n="vp"/><ab>Caus.</ab> <s>valayati</s> or <s>vAlayati</s> (<ls>Dhātup. xix, 58</ls>; <ab>aor.</ab> <s>avIvalat</s>),
<div n="to"/>to cause to move or turn or roll, <ls>Śiś.</ls>; <ls>HPariś.</ls>; <ls>Naiṣ.</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>;
<div n="to"/>to cherish &c., <ls>W.</ls> (rather <s>bAlayati</s>; see √ <hom>2.</hom> <s>bal</s>) :
<div n="vp"/><ab>Desid.</ab> of <ab>Caus.</ab> in <s>vivAlayizu</s>, <ab>q.v.</ab><info westergaard="vala,14.20,01.0322;vali,19.58,01.0540"/><info whitneyroots="val,155"/><info verb="genuineroot" cp="1Ā,1P"/>
